title: Verific will not elaborate top-level modules with interface ports
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

When attempting to run `read -formal` on [this AXI-to-AXI lite SV file](https://github.com/pulp-platform/axi/blob/master/src/axi_to_axi_lite.sv), I get the error, "VERIFIC-WARNING [VERI-1554] axi_to_axi_lite.sv: 137: module 'axi_to_axi_lite' having interface port(s) (in, out) cannot be elaborated by itself".  The design then fails to elaborate this module as a top level module when I call "prep -top axi_to_axi_lite".

This appears related to this post from Verific:

https://www.verific.com/faq/index.php?title=Top_level_module_with_interface_ports

## Expected behavior

The design can be elaborated

## Actual behavior

It cannot.
